holdings.infoBox: JMEE is an equity ETF with a total of 661 individual holdings. The top holdings are JPMorgan Prime Money Market Fund Class IM stock at 3.84%, Flex Ltd. at 0.94%, Curtiss-Wright at 0.72%, nVent Electric at 0.72%, and Twilio at 0.70%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan Small & Mid Cap Enhanced Equity ETF (JMEE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of small- and mid-cap US stocks and REITs. The fund uses a proprietary selection and weighting criteria, aiming to modestly outperform the total return of the S&P 1000 Index. JMEE was launched on May 6, 2022 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
